name: chart/kpi
description: KPI card showing a primary metric with optional delta indicator, icon, and sparkline.

meta.name: Kpi
meta.description: KPI card showing a primary metric with optional delta indicator, icon, and sparkline.

props.name: icon
props.description: Icon element rendered in the component.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS class names merged onto the root element.

examples.title: Basic KPI card
examples.code:
import { Kpi } from '@cascivo/charts'

<Kpi value="$12,400" label="Monthly revenue" delta={8.2} deltaLabel="vs last month" />

whenToUse: Highlighting a single headline metric with an optional change delta
Building dashboard summary tiles with an embedded sparkline trend
whenNotToUse: Showing a value against a target or range — use Bullet or Meter
Comparing multiple values — use a chart

related.name: Sparkline
related.reason: Embeds a micro-trend alongside the metric value

related.name: Bullet
related.reason: Use when the metric must be shown against a target

intent.a11yRationale: Renders with role="figure" and a labeled metric for screen reader context.
